description: DDL Training Data for Vanna - Database Schema

tables.name: companies
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE companies (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name_en_index VARCHAR(255),
    name_en_extracted VARCHAR(255),
    name_zh_extracted VARCHAR(255),
    name_en VARCHAR(255),
    name_zh VARCHAR(255),
    stock_code VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE,
    industry VARCHAR(100),
    sector VARCHAR(100),
    listing_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'listed',
    auditor VARCHAR(200),
    auditor_opinion VARCHAR(50),
    ultimate_controlling_shareholder VARCHAR(255),
    principal_banker VARCHAR(255),
    extra_data JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    listing_date DATE
);

tables.name: v_companies_resolved
tables.ddl: CREATE VIEW v_companies_resolved AS SELECT id, stock_code, COALESCE(name_en_index, name_en_extracted, name_en) AS display_name_en, COALESCE(name_zh_extracted, name_zh) AS display_name_zh, industry, sector, auditor, auditor_opinion, ultimate_controlling_shareholder, principal_banker, listing_status, listing_date FROM companies;
tables.note: Vanna 應優先查詢此視圖，它會自動選取最佳公司名稱（恆指報表 > PDF 擷取）

tables.name: v_documents_for_vanna
tables.ddl: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_documents_for_vanna AS SELECT d.id, d.doc_id, d.filename, d.report_type, d.year, d.processing_status, d.uploaded_at, c.name_en AS owner_company_name_en, c.name_zh AS owner_company_name_zh, c.stock_code AS owner_stock_code, d.dynamic_attributes->>'theme' AS doc_theme, d.dynamic_attributes->>'region' AS doc_region FROM documents d LEFT JOIN companies c ON d.owner_company_id = c.id;
tables.note: Vanna 專用視圖：將 documents 的 JSONB 屬性展平，方便查詢

tables.name: v_companies_for_vanna
tables.ddl: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_companies_for_vanna AS SELECT id, name_en, name_zh, stock_code, sector, is_industry_confirmed, COALESCE(confirmed_industry, ai_extracted_industries->>0) AS primary_industry, created_at FROM companies;
tables.note: 🌟 雙軌制行業解決方案：如果有權威定義就用權威，沒有的話就拿 AI 預測的第一個行業

tables.name: financial_metrics
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE financial_metrics (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    fiscal_period VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FY',
    metric_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    metric_name_zh VARCHAR(100),
    original_metric_name VARCHAR(200),
    value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    unit VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    standardized_value NUMERIC(20,2),
    standardized_currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'HKD',
    category VARCHAR(50),
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER,
    UNIQUE(company_id, year, fiscal_period, metric_name)
);

tables.name: market_data
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE market_data (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id),
    trade_date DATE NOT NULL,
    closing_price DECIMAL(18, 6),
    opening_price DECIMAL(18, 6),
    high_price DECIMAL(18, 6),
    low_price DECIMAL(18, 6),
    issued_shares BIGINT,
    trading_volume BIGINT,
    source VARCHAR(100),
    UNIQUE(company_id, trade_date)
);

tables.name: key_personnel
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE key_personnel (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    person_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    person_name_zh VARCHAR(200),
    role VARCHAR(100),
    role_zh VARCHAR(100),
    committee VARCHAR(200),
    committee_position VARCHAR(100),
    biography TEXT,
    biography_zh TEXT,
    age INTEGER,
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER
);

tables.name: shareholding_structure
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE shareholding_structure (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    shareholder_name VARCHAR(255),
    shareholder_type VARCHAR(50),
    trust_name VARCHAR(255),
    trustee_name VARCHAR(255),
    shares_held NUMERIC(20, 2),
    percentage NUMERIC(6, 4),
    is_controlling BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    is_institutional BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    source_document_id INTEGER REFERENCES documents(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    notes TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT unique_shareholder UNIQUE (company_id, year, shareholder_name)
);
tables.note: ⭐ Updated v2.3: Added trust_name and trustee_name for trust structure queries

tables.name: specific_events
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE specific_events (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id),
    doc_id VARCHAR(100),
    event_category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    event_type VARCHAR(100),
    event_title VARCHAR(500),
    event_detail TEXT,
    event_date DATE,
    effective_date DATE,
    announcement_date DATE,
    metric_value DECIMAL(20, 2),
    metric_unit VARCHAR(50),
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER
);

tables.name: revenue_breakdown
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE revenue_breakdown (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    category_type VARCHAR(50),
    percentage DECIMAL(10, 4),
    amount DECIMAL(20, 2),
    currency VARCHAR(10),
    sub_category VARCHAR(100),
    sub_percentage DECIMAL(10, 4),
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER,
    UNIQUE(company_id, year, category, category_type)
);

tables.name: debt_maturity
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE debt_maturity (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    maturity_year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    maturity_date DATE,
    amount DECIMAL(20, 2),
    currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'HKD',
    debt_type VARCHAR(100),
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER
);

tables.name: listing_applications
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE listing_applications (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER REFERENCES companies(id),
    doc_id VARCHAR(100),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    application_count INTEGER,
    approved_count INTEGER,
    rejected_count INTEGER,
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    source_page INTEGER,
    UNIQUE(year, company_id)
);

tables.name: document_pages
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE document_pages (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    company_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES companies(id),
    doc_id VARCHAR(100),
    year INTEGER NOT NULL,
    page_num INTEGER NOT NULL,
    markdown_content TEXT,
    content_type VARCHAR(50),
    has_images BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    has_charts BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    source_file VARCHAR(500),
    UNIQUE(company_id, year, page_num, source_file)
);

tables.name: documents
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE documents (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    filename VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    report_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'annual_report',
    is_index_report BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    parent_company VARCHAR(255),
    index_theme VARCHAR(255),
    confirmed_industry VARCHAR(100),
    ai_extracted_industries JSONB,
    dynamic_attributes JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    processing_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT valid_report_type CHECK (report_type IN ('annual_report', 'index_report'))
);
tables.note: Document-centric schema - stores report metadata and dynamic attributes

tables.name: document_companies
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE document_companies (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    document_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES documents(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    company_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    stock_code VARCHAR(50),
    assigned_industry VARCHAR(100),
    ai_suggested_industries JSONB,
    industry_source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'ai_extracted',
    industry_confidence DECIMAL(5, 4),
    dynamic_attributes JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT valid_industry_source CHECK (industry_source IN ('confirmed', 'ai_extracted', 'manual', 'pending'))
);
tables.note: Links documents to companies with industry assignment (Rule A/B)

tables.name: vanna_training_data
tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE vanna_training_data (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    question TEXT NOT NULL,
    sql_query TEXT NOT NULL,
    table_name VARCHAR(255),
    documentation TEXT,
    quality_score DECIMAL(3, 2),
    is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
tables.note: Stores Vanna training examples for text-to-SQL
